scripts.build: npm run build -w @chatpro/contracts && npm run build -w @chatpro/api && npm run build -w @chatpro/worker && npm run build -w @chatpro/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @chatpro/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @chatpro/api && npm run typecheck -w @chatpro/worker && npm run typecheck -w @chatpro/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @chatpro/contracts && npm run test -w @chatpro/api && npm run test -w @chatpro/worker && npm run test -w @chatpro/dashboard
